steps.title: Find pasture percentage
steps.content:
If $54.0\%$ of the plot is farmland, the remaining pasture is
$$
100\%-54.0\%=46.0\%
$$

steps.title: Compute building percentages
steps.content:
Find each building share as a percent of the whole plot:
$$
0.275(54.0)=14.85
$$
and
$$
0.125(46.0)=5.75
$$

steps.title: Add the two parts
steps.content: The total building percentage is $$ 14.85+5.75=20.6 $$ The answer is 20.6.
